summary: David, what an incredible milestone this week—you've now lost 50.4 pounds since starting, and your steady 2.5 lbs per week over the last two weeks shows your body is responding beautifully to the Mounjaro and your consistent effort. You're down to 264.6 lbs, which means you're nearly a sixth of the way to your goal, and that's genuinely remarkable progress. With 13 days of logged data, you're staying accountable, and that discipline is exactly what keeps momentum going. Next week, let's focus on dialing in your Dexcom insights to understand any patterns around your energy levels or cravings—knowledge like that often unlocks the next breakthrough. You're doing the work that matters.
